title: Set of 2 Large Square Easter Shopping Bags PP Woven 40cm x 40cm (2Pcs Daisy Flowers)
features: Decorated with lively and colorful Christmas / Easter themes gift bags showcase a range of designs, Daisy Flowers, Multicolored Flowers

AMPLE STORAGE SPACE - These Square gift bags offer plenty of room to hold a wide array of gifts, whether it's toys, clothing, or delightful holiday treats. These reusable bags serve as a convenient option to traditional wrapping paper, eliminating the need for cutting, taping, and folding

DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made from durable non-woven fabric, these bags can easily bear the weight of your gifts and the festive spirit of the holiday season. After the gifts have been opened, you can effortlessly fold these bags and tuck them away

EASY TO CARRY HANDLES - Each bag is equipped with strong and elegant handles. They not only enhance the aesthetics of your gifts but also make it effortless to carry and transport your presents, ensuring they arrive in style

DIMENSIONS - These bag measures 40cm (L) x 15cm (W) x 40cm (H) in size. You'll get a set of 2 gift bags. Their delightful look and functional design make them a perfect selection for any festive gathering

Enhance your holiday gift-giving with our set of 2 Easter / Christmas gift bags, each adorned with delightful and charming holiday designs. These designs wrap your presents in a warm, festive embrace that's sure to bring smiles to the faces of your loved ones, making your gifts all the more special

Crafted from high-quality non-woven fabric, these gift bags are not only durable but also lightweight. Their reusable nature allows for convenient use during trips, while their fade-free and odorless characteristics ensure the lasting appeal of your presents
These Square gift bags are designed to offer ample storage space for a variety of toys and gifts.
